info.title: Invoice Exception Resolution — Agent Tools
info.description: Six tools powering the autonomous invoice exception resolution agent. Import /openapi.json into IBM watsonx Orchestrate to register all tools at once.

post.description: Receive an invoice reference, run three-way matching against the PO and GRN, classify all exception types, and persist the exception to Redis. Returns an exception_id that must be passed to all subsequent tool calls. If is_straight_through is True, skip directly to Tool 6.

get.description: Query Redis for all resolved exceptions from the same supplier and product category. Compute substitution pattern statistics and a confidence score. Stores the supplier context in Redis for Tools 3 and 4.

post.description: Construct targeted Tavily search queries based on the exception type and supplier, score findings for relevance, and store the top results in Redis. Also transitions the exception state to RESEARCHING. Requires Tool 2 to have run first.

Apply the business rules decision tree using the exception classification, historical pattern data, and Tavily research findings. Returns a resolution recommendation with confidence score. Requires Tools 2 and 3 to have run first.

get.description: Assemble the structured resolution memo: PO vs invoice comparison, root cause, evidence with source links, recommended action, and confidence. Stores the memo in Redis so Tool 6 can attach it to the final Resolution record. Requires Tools 2, 3, and 4 to have run first.

post.description: Transition the exception to its final state (RESOLVED or ESCALATED), persist the Resolution record to Redis, and log the closing audit event. This must be the last tool called. Requires Tool 4 (and usually Tools 2, 3, 5) to have run first. For straight-through invoices (is_straight_through=True from Tool 1), call this directly after Tool 1 with no notes.

action.title: Action
action.description: Recommended action: AUTO_APPROVE, AUTO_REJECT, or ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN.

reasoning.title: Reasoning
reasoning.description: Plain-English explanation of which rule fired and why.

auto_resolvable.title: Auto Resolvable
auto_resolvable.description: True → call Tool 5 then Tool 6 to auto-resolve. False → call Tool 5 then Tool 6, which will escalate to a human.

total_historical_exceptions.title: Total Historical Exceptions
total_historical_exceptions.description: Number of exception records on file for this supplier.

substitution_patterns.title: Substitution Patterns
substitution_patterns.description: Known SKU substitution patterns observed for this supplier: [{from_sku, to_sku, count, avg_price_uplift_pct}]

average_price_uplift_pct.title: Average Price Uplift Pct
average_price_uplift_pct.description: Average historical price uplift from informal modifications, or null if no history.

exception_rate.title: Exception Rate
exception_rate.description: Fraction of this supplier's invoices that generated exceptions.

pattern_confidence.title: Pattern Confidence
pattern_confidence.description: 0.0–1.0 — how strongly the current exception matches a known historical pattern. Above 0.8 means a repeat pattern; below 0.3 means novel.

invoice_number.title: Invoice Number
invoice_number.description: Invoice number from the dataset, e.g. 'INV-2024-00123'

po_number.title: Po Number
po_number.description: Purchase Order number this invoice references, e.g. 'PO-2024-00456'

grn_number.title: Grn Number
grn_number.description: Goods Receipt Note number, if known. Leave null to auto-resolve from the dataset by PO number.

exception_id.title: Exception Id
exception_id.description: Unique ID for this exception — pass this to all subsequent tool calls.

total_variance_usd.title: Total Variance Usd
total_variance_usd.description: Absolute USD variance between invoice total and PO total.

informal_modification_signals.title: Informal Modification Signals
informal_modification_signals.description: Signals explaining why an informal modification is suspected (empty if none).

is_straight_through.title: Is Straight Through
is_straight_through.description: True if no exceptions detected. If True, skip to Tool 6 to mark as resolved — no research needed.

full_memo_json.title: Full Memo Json
full_memo_json.description: Complete ResolutionMemo as JSON — store this for the audit trail.

queries_run.title: Queries Run
queries_run.description: Exact search queries submitted to Tavily.

findings_count.title: Findings Count
findings_count.description: Number of unique search results returned.

supports_informal_modification.title: Supports Informal Modification
supports_informal_modification.description: True if at least one finding corroborates a substitution or undocumented change.

relevance_summary.title: Relevance Summary
relevance_summary.description: Plain-English summary of what external research found.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Optional human override notes to append to the audit trail.

final_state.title: Final State
final_state.description: Final exception state: RESOLVED or ESCALATED.
